cj.t: 审判长, 法院院长, 首席法官

cjd.t: abbr. 克罗伊茨费尔特—雅各布病（Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease）；中国期刊全文数据库
cjd.d: n. rare (usually fatal) brain disease (usually in middle age) caused by an unidentified slow virus; characterized by progressive dementia and gradual loss of muscle control

cjtf.t: abbr. Commander, Joint Task Force 联合特混部队司令（美军）
